title: Sable: Physics Compat
description: A Compat mod for Sable/Aeronautics providing tags for several modded blocks.
body:
Adds physics properties for several modded blocks. This includes floating, friction, bounciness, and weight. Currently covers nearly 100 major mods! For use with Aeronautics but still works without.
Affected mods (81+)
  • Adorn
  • AE2 (basic, will be expanded on)
  • Aether
  • Alex's Caves
  • Alex's Mobs
  • Alpine Whispers
  • Another Furniture
  • Aquaculture
  • Architect's Palette
  • Atmospheric
  • Autumnity

  • Better Nether

If you'd like any more mods to be added or changes to be made, you can message Number1Riker on Discord NOTE: I won't be adding compat for other Create Addons as of now, because I figured its a given that they will be adding Sable Properties of their own. If after a while they still have not, I will go ahead and add them! Requires Sable.
